chosen_action.title: Claude Code + Codex Workflow: Plan, Build, Review

reason: Codeberg adoption is flat and same-family directory/curator lanes are already saturated or inside measurement windows.
Reddit is structurally constrained, and StackOverflow posting remains blocked from this runtime.
A Claude Code + Codex workflow explainer matches live evaluator pain and points directly to the Codeberg-first repo path.

devto.reason: No dev.to API key in accounts/devto_creds.json

measurement_window.success_signal: visible reuse of the article or any Codeberg star/watch/fork movement within 14 days
measurement_window.replacement_condition: if no visible reuse and no primary-repo movement after current windows mature, replace owned-content reuse with a different executable demand-capture lane
